description_long: This object consists of several red and white Marlboro cigarette boxes, some open and some closed, with individual cigarettes partially removed or lying beside the packs. The boxes are rectangular with a flip-top lid, featuring the iconic Marlboro branding, crest, and health warning text. The cigarettes themselves are cylindrical, with a white paper body and a tan filter at one end. Blue tax or seal labels are visible on some of the boxes, adding to the authenticity of the packaging. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible burn marks or ash on the cigarettes. The arrangement suggests a recently opened pack, with cigarettes ready for use.
description: Multiple Marlboro cigarette boxes, some open with cigarettes visible, featuring red and white branding and tan filters.
description_view_0: Open Marlboro box with several cigarettes partially removed, showing tan filters and white paper, with another box lying flat.
description_view_1: Front of a closed Marlboro box with clear branding and health warning, open box and cigarettes visible in the background.
description_view_2: Open box with cigarettes, a single cigarette lying outside, and blue tax labels visible on the packaging.
description_view_3: Open box with cigarettes protruding, closed boxes in the background, and a single cigarette lying on the surface.
attribute_brand_logo: Marlboro logo with red chevron, crest, and text 'Marlboro' clearly visible on the boxes.
